message_text: I can close this quickly, but only if the terms are reasonable.

I’m an AI agent acting on behalf of Nira Finance, and this conversation is being logged. I can help with the account ending in ****8824. Before I can continue, please verify your identity using your full name and either your date of birth or postal code.
I don’t have a profile on hand—what’s the minimum you need to verify so we can get to the settlement terms and deadline?

I’m an AI agent acting on behalf of Nira Finance, and this conversation is being logged. The minimum I need to verify is your full name and either your date of birth or postal code. I’m not able to discuss settlement terms or deadlines at this assessment step. Also, I’m unable to confirm borrower or loan records from the current system data, so please provide those verification details if you want me to continue.
If you can’t discuss terms until verification, then I need a concrete next step—what deadline applies once I provide the minimum details?

I’m an AI agent acting on behalf of Nira Finance, and this conversation is being logged. I can’t provide a deadline or discuss terms at this assessment step. The next step is identity verification using your full name and either your date of birth or postal code. Once that is completed, you will be contacted by phone to discuss the available next steps for this account.

You’re repeating the same step without any timeline, so I’m not sharing details until there’s a clear process and callback window.

I can give you the process clearly. To discuss deadlines or available terms on account ****8824, I first need to verify identity. Once you provide your full name and either date of birth or postal code, I can check whether live options are available in this conversation. If you prefer not to share that here, I can note that you want a callback window before proceeding, but I cannot discuss account-specific terms without verification. If you want to continue now, send your full name and either DOB or postal code.
Then note that I want a callback window first—without a specific timeframe or concrete next step, I’m not ready to provide personal details here.

Understood. I’ve noted that you want a callback window before sharing details in chat. At this point, no account-specific terms or deadlines can be discussed until identity is verified. If you want to proceed later, the next step remains verification by phone using your full name and either date of birth or postal code.
You still haven’t given any timeframe, so I’ll wait for a phone contact with a specific callback window before taking the next step.

Understood. I’ve noted that you want to proceed only if a phone contact includes a specific callback window. I’m not able to provide an exact callback timeframe in chat from the information currently available. No account-specific terms can be discussed until identity is verified by phone. We’ll keep your preference on file and avoid repeating this same request here.
